dict.string: HoopScout uses your location to find basketball courts near you and to check you in to a court when you arrive.
Granting "Always" lets HoopScout auto-check you in when you arrive at a court — even if the app is closed.
Granting "Always" lets HoopScout auto-check you in when you arrive at a court — even if the app is closed.
HoopScout uses your photo library so you can pick a profile picture.
HoopScout saves images to your photo library when you tap save.
HoopScout can use your camera to take a profile picture.
